data.change_summary: Addressed all pending milestone-record amendments. `reconcile_snapshot_from_lineage` now filters active beads directly from already-collapsed latest runs, preserves `Paused` when no bead remains active, and the single-use `LockAttemptSnapshotStore` test helper now documents and asserts its one-shot coordination contract. In the filesystem journal adapter, terminal replays that backfill `plan_hash` or `outcome_detail` now repair the existing completion event in place instead of appending a duplicate entry. Added regression tests for paused-state preservation and completion-event backfill repair.
outstanding_risks: Milestone mutations still span separate lineage, snapshot, and journal files without a cross-file transaction, so a crash between file writes can still leave snapshot or journal state temporarily behind `task-runs.ndjson` until the same operation is replayed or state is reconciled from lineage.

steps.description: Updated milestone snapshot reconciliation to avoid redundant bead-run collapsing, preserve operator-set `Paused` status across lineage reconciliation, and make the lock-contention test helper explicitly single-use.
Extended the filesystem journal adapter so completion-event replays with newly backfilled optional metadata merge into the existing journal row instead of appending a duplicate completion event.
Added regression coverage for paused completion reconciliation and completion-event backfill repair, then reran formatting, milestone_record tests, and clippy validation.
